trigger_condition: repeatable positive-mean periodic fitting response with unchanged topology
minimum_evidence_before_claim: time-resolved mdot; pressure or dissipation terms; mean/amplitude/frequency; steady section K; periodicity; no zero crossing; single dominant frequency; source-range overlap
explicit_reject_conditions: startup transient; chaotic oscillation; zero crossing; topology change; persistent exchange/recirculation-cell behavior; direct TAMU coefficient transfer

trigger_condition: verified FOM ensemble exists and 1D closures cannot represent the spatial state cheaply enough
minimum_evidence_before_claim: verified CFD/FOM package; snapshot ensemble; boundary-parameter metadata; mode/energy criterion; conservation error; extrapolation detector; held-out validation
explicit_reject_conditions: unverified CFD; missing snapshot coverage; no mode/energy criterion; no conservation check; no held-out validation; universal extrapolation claim
